hub_subtitle: Medical English to welcome guests and present with confidence

lesson.menu_desc: Confirm, change or cancel a meeting; say if you are available, busy or free; prepositions of time at / on / in -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 10 -- Confirming Appointments
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Graziele Dias | Aula 10 -- Confirming Appointments

listenings.text: Hello Graziele, this is Dr. Carter. I am calling to change our meeting. I am busy on Tuesday, so Tuesday is not good for me. I am available on Wednesday in the morning. Can we meet on Wednesday at ten o'clock? Please confirm by email. Thank you very much.

Hi Graziele, this is Ana with the new schedule. The team meeting is confirmed for Wednesday at ten o'clock. Doctor Carter is available, and the room is free. Please do not cancel the cardiology call at two. Everything is ready. Have a good day!

extra_audio.text: Dr. Carter calls to confirm the meeting. He is busy in the morning. Graziele offers the afternoon. They change the meeting to three o'clock. She confirms the new time.
